bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has announced the undergraduate "Wishlist" event schedule for Fall 2026.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award, reference B-113, for ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2 has been issued by BRAC University.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has issued a notice of award, reference B-113, for ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: A general recruitment notice has been published by BRAC University.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a seminar to raise awareness about cervical cancer on campus.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University launched an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative to encourage sustainable choices among its community members.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has received a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
